mechanism_narrative: Rising non-farm payrolls growth consistently signals expanding corporate revenue expectations, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over a 20-day horizon as earnings revisions turn upward.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns are statistically indistinguishable from zero when PAYEMS month-over-month change is positive over a 12-month rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: When the federal funds rate crosses below 0.5%, it signals a liquidity injection regime that reduces equity discount rates and compresses risk premiums, yielding positive forward returns over a 5-day horizon.
failure_condition: Forward 5-day returns are negative or flat in more than 50% of instances where FEDFUNDS drops below 0.5%.

mechanism_narrative: A divergence where industrial production rises while housing starts fall indicates capital is shifting from real estate to manufacturing, boosting corporate profit margins and driving positive S&P 500 returns over a 60-day horizon.
failure_condition: The cross-product of INDPRO and HOUST changes shows no predictive power for 60-day SPX returns with a Rank IC below 0.02.

mechanism_narrative: In a high-unemployment regime, further increases in the jobless rate trigger recession fears that compress equity valuations, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over a 20-day horizon.
failure_condition: SPX 20-day forward returns are positive in more than 60% of observations where UNRATE exceeds 7.0% and continues to rise.

mechanism_narrative: Sequential quarterly growth in real GDP directly expands the earnings base for S&P 500 constituents, generating positive forward returns over a 60-day horizon as valuation multiples expand alongside nominal growth.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns are negative when GDPC1 shows positive quarter-over-quarter growth over a 4-quarter rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: When the CPI index crosses above 260, it signals entrenched inflation that forces prolonged restrictive monetary policy, compressing equity multiples and driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over a 20-day horizon.
failure_condition: SPX 20-day returns are positive in more than 55% of instances where CPIAUCSL remains above 260 for consecutive months.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous strength in employment growth and consumer credit expansion indicates robust household balance sheets, fueling durable goods demand and driving positive S&P 500 returns over a 5-day horizon.
failure_condition: The joint positive movement of PAYEMS and RSAFS fails to predict positive 5-day SPX returns in more than 50% of rolling 2-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: In a post-shock recovery regime, a sustained uptrend in industrial production without corresponding CPI acceleration indicates expanding capacity utilization and margin improvement, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over a 60-day horizon.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns are negative when INDPRO rises for three consecutive months while CPIAUCSL remains flat or declining.
